tests.title: Login - happy path
tests.preconditions: App running at http://localhost:5173; backend /auth available; test user exists (test@example.com / Test123!)

steps.action: Open Auth modal via Header → Login
Enter email and password and submit
Wait for auth-changed event and navigate to /dashboard/{userId}
steps.expected: Dashboard loads and user data is visible

tests.expected_result: User is authenticated, token stored, dashboard visible

tests.title: Login - validation and error handling

steps.action: Open Login modal and submit empty form

steps.expected: Server error shown - invalid credentials message

tests.expected_result: Proper validation and server errors are shown to the user

steps.expected: Redirected to /home or Auth modal displayed

tests.title: Dashboard basic load and API calls
tests.expected_result: Dashboard UI renders with backend data

tests.title: Sensor details navigation and state preservation
tests.preconditions: Logged in; at least one sensor exists

steps.action: Open Sensors list and click a sensor
Verify localStorage values like dashboardActiveTab and dashboardSelectedSensor are set
steps.expected: Dashboard navigates to correct tab when returning

tests.expected_result: Sensor selection persists and navigates correctly

tests.title: Settings update persists

steps.action: Open SettingsPanel and toggle a setting (Two-Factor) and save

tests.expected_result: Settings persisted on server and UI reflects change

tests.title: Responsiveness and accessibility smoke

steps.action: Resize to mobile, open modal and navigate with keyboard
steps.expected: Layout adapts and focus order is logical

tests.expected_result: Basic responsive behavior and keyboard accessibility are present

steps.expected: User-friendly error message or fallback UI
